wall_line_handles.reason: 1176-long horizontal line paired 50 below (57B1), wall-like double line
parallel mate of 57AF at 50 offset, forms wall-thickness band
geometric duplicate of 57AF, same long parallel band
geometric duplicate of 57B1, same long parallel band

notes: 국기계양대 심볼 INSERT + WIPEOUT 2개 + 가늘고 긴(1220x126) 이중선 브래킷/레일 외곽선으로 구성된 익명 조립 심볼 블록

rationale.evidence: The block nests INSERT 57AE of 'X-평면도(기본형)$0$국기계양대' (flagpole mount), two WIPEOUTs (57AC/57AD) for masking, and 20 LINEs on layer 0. The lines trace a long thin band: a 1176x50 rectangle (57AF-57B2, duplicated by 57B7/57BF) inside a 1220x126 outline with small end notches (57B3-57C2). This shape reads as a mounting rail/bracket elevation-in-plan around the flagpole symbol rather than building fabric.
rationale.rule: An anonymous block that nests a named equipment symbol plus WIPEOUT masking and a small self-contained outline is a composed annotation/equipment symbol; long parallel line pairs inside it are symbol linework unless they extend at building scale and connect to other fabric.
rationale.counterfactual: If the parallel 50-offset lines extended over several meters, sat on a wall layer, or joined other wall segments, I would reclassify toward 평면 부분도 and raise wall_likelihood; absence of the 국기계양대 INSERT would remove the symbol reading entirely.
rationale.uncertainty: From this projection I cannot see the drawing context (what the block is inserted next to) or layer semantics of layer 0 here, so whether the 50-wide band is a real wall stub or purely symbol framing is not fully decidable; the 0.3 likelihood reflects that residual chance.

notes: INSUL 레이어 5-정점 LWPOLYLINE 17개만으로 구성된 단열재 해치(배트) 패턴 블록 — 짧은 단열재 구간

rationale.evidence: All 17 entities are LWPOLYLINEs with exactly 5 vertices on layer 'X-평면도(기본형)$0$INSUL' (handles 5802..5812, all 17 listed). The uniform 5-vertex closed tiles repeated on an INSUL layer are the classic batt-insulation zigzag hatch, and there are no LINEs, arcs, text, or dimension entities at all; the LINE-derived bbox is even reported as not derivable because no LINE exists.
rationale.rule: A block whose entire content is many identical small closed polylines on an insulation (INSUL) layer is a pattern-fill fragment (insulation hatch), not a symbol, furniture, dimension cache, or plan fragment; the entity homogeneity plus the layer name decides it.
rationale.counterfactual: If the block also contained long parallel LINEs bounding the tile run, or the layer were a wall layer instead of INSUL, I would treat it as a wall plan fragment (평면 부분도) and list those boundary lines as wall candidates; text or dimension entities would push it toward 치수캐시.
rationale.uncertainty: Vertex coordinates are not given, so I cannot confirm the tiles form a linear zigzag run nor measure its length or orientation; insulation normally sits inside a wall cavity, so the block marks where a wall likely is, but it contains no wall lines itself — hence low but nonzero wall_likelihood.

rationale.counterfactual: If the block also contained long parallel LINEs bounding the tile run, or the layer were a wall layer instead of INSUL, I would treat it as a wall plan fragment (평면 부분도) and list those boundary lines as wall candidates; text or dimension entities would push it toward 치수캐시.
rationale.uncertainty: Vertex coordinates are not given, so I cannot confirm the tiles form a linear zigzag run nor measure its length or orientation; insulation normally sits inside a wall cavity, so the block marks where a wall likely is, but it contains no wall lines itself — hence low but nonzero wall_likelihood.

notes: INSUL 레이어 5-정점 LWPOLYLINE 23개만으로 구성된 단열재 해치(배트) 패턴 블록 — 짧은 단열재 구간
